description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find a family-focused evening visit between December 10 and 20 that starts between 5:00–7:00 pm, sort the options by lowest total price for two adults and two children, then add the cheapest one to your cart for that group size.
tasks.name: Find a family-focused evening visit between December 10 and 20 that starts between 5:00–7:00 pm, sort the options by lowest total price for two adults and two children, then add the cheapest one to your cart for that group size.

tasks.instruction: On December 18, build an itinerary between 4:00–8:00 pm that includes one family-friendly Santa-themed activity, one light show, and one indoor craft workshop, and add those three activities to your night.

tasks.instruction: Locate the main wheelchair-accessible entrance and any accessible viewing area, then use the site's accessibility contact form to ask—under the accessibility/mobility topic—whether wheelchairs can be reserved at that main entrance, providing your name and email.

target_names: Main Plaza Light Show Viewing Deck

tasks.instruction: On the next available Saturday, find a sensory-friendly morning session starting before 10:00 am where child tickets cost $15 or less, leave all add-ons unselected, and add one adult and one child ticket for that session to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Create a Friday night group booking for 15 guests after 8:00 pm by choosing the cheapest available session that offers a group discount and supports paying on arrival or by invoice, then continue to the final review step without making a payment.

target_names: Group Evening – Fri Dec 11, 8:45 pm (Best Deal)

tasks.instruction: Subscribe to the site's holiday newsletter by selecting only the family-activities and special-offers interest options, choosing weekly updates, and submitting the form with your contact details.

tasks.instruction: Compare two adult ticket types—one standard and one upgraded holiday option—and add two adult tickets for the choice that includes at least one complimentary drink while keeping the total for both adults under $120, otherwise choosing the cheaper option under that amount.

target_names: VIP Holiday Package – 2 Adults (includes complimentary holiday drink)

tasks.instruction: From the public transit information, identify a bus route whose stop is within a 10-minute walk and runs until at least 10:00 pm, then use the contact form's transportation/parking topic to send a message asking about the exact last departure time for that route, including your name and email.
